title: WedDecor Stylish Clear 6pcs Charger Plates with Silver Beaded Rim – Acrylic Charger Plates for Weddings, Parties, Kitchen Décor, and Tabletop Styling, Affordable Bulk Option
features: 𝐄𝐥𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐠𝐞𝐫 𝐏𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐀𝐥𝐥 𝐎𝐜𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬: Enhance your dining experience with these exquisite 13-inch charger plates, which feature silver beaded borders. These charger plates add a touch of elegance to any event, be it a formal dinner party, wedding, banquet, party, or even family dinner.

𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐮𝐦 𝐀𝐜𝐫𝐲𝐥𝐢𝐜 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐒𝐢𝐥𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐁𝐞𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐝 𝐓𝐫𝐢𝐦: Their high-quality acrylic construction allows for both official and informal use. These acrylic charger plates are durable, yet lightweight and easy to clean. Secure your salad plates, soup bowls, and dinner plates with these glass charger plates, shielding your table against spills and stains.

𝐄𝐧𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐬 𝐃𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐫 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐬 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐓𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞: These clear white charger plates with a silver beaded edge are perfect for creating a classic and elegant atmosphere for any formal dinner party, wedding reception, or your home dining event.

𝐌𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐚 𝐋𝐨𝐧𝐠-𝐋𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐒𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐞: Do not wash or soak with hot water, as the rim may peel off. You should not microwave or wash these silver beaded charger plates in a dishwasher. To clean them, simply wash them with standard soap and water and dry them with a towel before reusing them.
𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐏𝐚𝐜𝐤 𝐒𝐢𝐳𝐞𝐬: Available in packs of one, six, or twelve round charger plates. These 33-cm plates are durable and lightweight, and they need little maintenance. They are resistant to fading.
description: Product Description What are the dimensions of the acrylic charger plates? Each acrylic charger plate is 13 inches in diameter, making it ideal for nesting salad plates, soup bowls, and dinner plates to create a polished table presentation. Are these acrylic charger plates safe for microwave, oven, or dishwasher use? No, these decorative acrylic plates are not safe for use in the microwave, oven, or dishwasher. They are meant for presentation purposes only. How do I clean the charger plates properly? Gently rinse with regular soapy water. Avoid soaking or using hot water to preserve their elegant finish and prevent warping or damage. What types of events are these charger plates best suited for? These versatile and elegant charger plates are perfect for weddings, anniversaries, bridal showers, birthdays, holiday gatherings, banquets, and receptions. What quantity options are available for purchase? You can choose to buy these acrylic charger plates in the quantities of 1, 6, or 12 pieces, making them ideal for both intimate dinners and large-scale events.
